query: What does the READACCT JCL job do?

results.name: PREDEL
READACCT Header
STEP05
9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTUPC.cbl
Program: COACTUPC - Business logic - Accept and process ACCOUNT UPDATE
Paragraph: 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT (lines 3608-3649)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY CSLKPCDY, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CSSETATY, COPY CSUTLDPY
Calls: PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST, PERFORM 9500-STORE-FETCHED-DATA
results.summary: paragraph 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT in COACTUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, CSLKPCDY, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST, PERFORM 9500-STORE-FETCHED-DATA.
results.content:
9000-READ-ACCT.

           INITIALIZE ACUP-OLD-DETAILS

           SET  WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE      TO TRUE

           MOVE CC-ACCT-ID              TO ACUP-OLD-ACCT-ID
                                           WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID

           PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT
              THRU 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT

           IF FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT
           END-IF

           PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT
              THRU 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT

           IF DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-ACCTDAT
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT
           END-IF

           MOVE CDEMO-CUST-ID TO WS-CARD-RID-CUST-ID

           PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST
              THRU 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST-EXIT

           IF DID-NOT-FIND-CUST-IN-CUSTDAT
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT
           END-IF



           PERFORM 9500-STORE-FETCHED-DATA
              THRU 9500-STORE-FETCHED-DATA-EXIT
           .


       9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT.
           EXIT
           .

results.name: 3000-READ-ACCOUNT
results.preamble:

results.summary: paragraph 3000-READ-ACCOUNT in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
3000-READ-ACCOUNT.
           MOVE ACCT-ID TO FD-ACCT-ID
           READ ACCOUNT-FILE RECORD INTO ACCOUNT-RECORD
           KEY IS FD-ACCT-ID
                INVALID KEY
                  DISPLAY 'INVALID ACCOUNT NUMBER FOUND'
                  MOVE 4 TO WS-ACCT-READ-STATUS
                NOT INVALID KEY
                  DISPLAY 'SUCCESSFUL READ OF ACCOUNT FILE'
           END-READ.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT (lines 687-722)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST
results.summary: paragraph 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST.
results.content:
9000-READ-ACCT.                                                          
                                                                                
           SET  WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE  TO TRUE
           
           MOVE CDEMO-ACCT-ID TO WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID                            
                                                                                
           PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT                                      
              THRU 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT                                 
                                                                                
      *    IF DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-CARDXREF                                     
           IF FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                                             
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT                                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT                                      
              THRU 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT                                 
                                                                                
           IF DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-ACCTDAT                                      
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT                                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           MOVE CDEMO-CUST-ID TO WS-CARD-RID-CUST-ID                            
                                                                                
           PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST                                      
              THRU 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST-EXIT                                 
                                                                                
           IF DID-NOT-FIND-CUST-IN-CUSTDAT                                      
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT                                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT.                                                     
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT (lines 774-824)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT
results.summary: paragraph 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT.
results.content:
9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT.                                                 
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS READ                                                       
                DATASET   (LIT-ACCTFILENAME)                                    
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)                               
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)                     
                INTO      (ACCOUNT-RECORD)                                      
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF ACCOUNT-RECORD)                            
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)                                          
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD                                                  
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)                                             
                  SET FOUND-ACCT-IN-MASTER        TO TRUE                       
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)                                             
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE                       
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK       TO TRUE                       
      *           SET DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-ACCTDAT TO TRUE                      
                  IF WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF                                          
                    MOVE WS-RESP-CD               TO ERROR-RESP                 
                    MOVE WS-REAS-CD               TO ERROR-RESP2                
                    STRING                                                      
                    'Account:'                                                  
                     WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X                                      
                    ' not found in'                                             
                    ' Acct Master file.Resp:'                                   
                    ERROR-RESP                                                  
                    ' Reas:'                                                    
                    ERROR-RESP2                                                 
                    DELIMITED BY SIZE                                           
                    INTO WS-RETURN-MSG                                          
                    END-STRING                                                  
                  END-IF                                                        
      *                                                                         
               WHEN OTHER                                                       
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE                       
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                TO TRUE              
                  MOVE 'READ'                     TO ERROR-OPNAME               
                  MOVE LIT-ACCTFILENAME           TO ERROR-FILE                 
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP                 
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP2                
                  MOVE WS-FILE-ERROR-MESSAGE      TO WS-RETURN-MSG              
      *                                              WS-LONG-MSG                
      *           PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT                                        
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
           .                                                                    
       9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT.                                            
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

Paragraph: 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT (lines 3701-3751)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY CSLKPCDY, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CSSETATY, COPY CSUTLDPY

results.content:
9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (LIT-ACCTFILENAME)
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                INTO      (ACCOUNT-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF ACCOUNT-RECORD)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                  SET FOUND-ACCT-IN-MASTER        TO TRUE
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK       TO TRUE
      *           SET DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-ACCTDAT TO TRUE
                  IF WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF
                    MOVE WS-RESP-CD               TO ERROR-RESP
                    MOVE WS-REAS-CD               TO ERROR-RESP2
                    STRING
                    'Account:'
                     WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X
                    ' not found in'
                    ' Acct Master file.Resp:'
                    ERROR-RESP
                    ' Reas:'
                    ERROR-RESP2
                    DELIMITED BY SIZE
                    INTO WS-RETURN-MSG
                    END-STRING
                  END-IF
      *
               WHEN OTHER
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                TO TRUE
                  MOVE 'READ'                     TO ERROR-OPNAME
                  MOVE LIT-ACCTFILENAME           TO ERROR-FILE
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP2
                  MOVE WS-FILE-ERROR-MESSAGE      TO WS-RETURN-MSG
      *                                              WS-LONG-MSG
      *           PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT
           END-EVALUATE
           .
       9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT.
           EXIT
           .

results.name: READCARD Header
GETACCTDATA-BYACCT
results.preamble:
File: COPAUS0C.cbl
Program: COPAUS0C - CICS COBOL IMS BMS Program - Summary View of Authoriation Messages
Paragraph: GETACCTDATA-BYACCT (lines 865-914)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COPAU00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CIPAUSMY, COPY CIPAUDTY, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph GETACCTDATA-BYACCT in COPAUS0C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COPAU00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN.
results.content:
GETACCTDATA-BYACCT.
      *****************************************************************

           MOVE XREF-ACCT-ID            TO WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID
           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-ACCTFILENAME)
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                INTO      (ACCOUNT-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF ACCOUNT-RECORD)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                  continue
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD        TO WS-RESP-CD-DIS
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD        TO WS-REAS-CD-DIS

                  STRING
                  'Account:'
                   WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X
                  ' not found in ACCT file. Resp:' WS-RESP-CD-DIS
                  ' Reas:' WS-REAS-CD-DIS
                  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
                  END-STRING
                  MOVE -1       TO ACCTIDL OF COPAU0AI
                  PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                  MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD        TO WS-RESP-CD-DIS
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD        TO WS-REAS-CD-DIS

                  STRING
                  'Account:'
                   WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X
                  ' System error while reading ACCT file. Resp:'
                  WS-RESP-CD-DIS ' Reas:' WS-REAS-CD-DIS
                  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
                  END-STRING
                  MOVE -1       TO ACCTIDL OF COPAU0AI
                  PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE
           .

      *****************************************************************
